completed_slice.finding: Continuity trust requires four separately evidenced gates: structural validity, graph-semantic validity, source authenticity/reachability, and privacy/authority/coverage policy. Passing an earlier gate does not establish later gates.
completed_slice.verification: GitHub contents API accepted the UTF-8 JSON record and returned commit 4b8ddd64054625d213783e7e90fb953d62a82d8e. Runtime JSON parsing was not executed in this connector-only run.
